task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz application is open, and the window title, project browser, or Xsheet shows 'dwanko_run.tnz'.

task_completion.description: Set the scene background color to solid chroma-key green (RGB: 0, 255, 0).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main viewer/canvas shows the animation character against a bright solid green background, or the Scene Settings/Camera dialog shows the background color explicitly set to bright green (RGB 0, 255, 0).

task_completion.description: Configure the render output format to PNG and the destination directory to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/greenscreen/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Output Settings' window in OpenToonz is visible, showing the file format selected as 'png' and the 'Save In' path set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/greenscreen/'.

task_completion.description: Initiate the rendering process for the animation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rendering progress bar dialog is visible in OpenToonz, or a 'Render completed' notification is shown.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 10 PNG frames were successfully generated in the target directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows the contents of '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/greenscreen/', displaying multiple generated '.png' files (e.g., 0001.png, 0002.png) with a green background visible in the thumbnails.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz GUI to configure and render the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through OpenToonz menus, scene settings, and output configuration dialogs rather than using terminal commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent modified the background within OpenToonz before rendering.
integrity.visual_evidence: The green background is visible inside the OpenToonz application viewer or settings, proving it wasn't added post-render using external image editing tools or scripts.

integrity.description: The output files were generated via the OpenToonz render engine.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of the OpenToonz render dialog or output settings being configured, ensuring the agent didn't just copy pre-existing green screen images into the folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source scene is located at '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. The expected background color is solid green (RGB: 0, 255, 0). The output must be saved to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/greenscreen' and contain at least 10 PNG frames. The total size of the output frames should be greater than 100KB.
